title: Stainless Steel Onion Slice Holder, New Onion Holder for Slicing, Lemon Slicer Vegetable Cutter, Chopper Slicing Assistant Tool for Potato, Tomato, Meat, Home Kitchen Tools (2 Pack)
features: 【Onion Slice Holder】Slicing onions becomes quick and effortless with our 2024 upgraded onion slice holder. Equipped with 10 stainless steel forks, it securely holds the onion in place for precise cutting. The comfortable grip and non-slip design ensure a safe and efficient slicing experience

【Safe and Convenient Kitchen Chopper】The onion holder slicer allows you to replace your hands while cutting, offering added safety and precision. Its ergonomic design ensures a comfortable grip, making it user-friendly for anyone
【Durable Material】Made of rust-resistant plastic and stainless steel for long-lasting durability. Easy to clean and maintain
【Time Saving】This tool eliminates the need for tedious and time-consuming slicing, saving you time and keeping your hands free from onion contact

【Versatile Kitchen Assistant】Our onion slice holder is not limited to onions alone. It can be used for slicing various fruits, vegetables, and even meats. With its multipurpose functionality, it proves to be an indispensable tool in any home kitchen, making meal preparation a breeze
